agent_assessment.rationale: The text clearly asks for a SMILES corresponding to the depicted chemistry structure, and the image is legible enough to inspect the drawn groups. However, the figure looks like an arrow-pushing mechanistic/transition-state-style diagram, so mapping it to one unambiguous static SMILES is somewhat risky even though the sample is broadly understandable.
